normative_oracle.rule: Lexaloffle Education 0.2.7 is normative for browser-observable status and PCM. Licensed desktop PICO-8 remains required only for native exporters and capabilities absent from Education. Never bless an independent runtime as an official golden.

captures.method: Run the public browser-safe fixture in Education 0.2.7, bind PCM collection to audio_0..audio_150, and compare stable stat(24/54/57) events exactly plus the named single-channel PCM window.
purpose: music start/stop and exact 500ms fade boundary
explicit channel playback and live SFX RAM copy
built-in triangle pitch and output level

captures.method: Run the public Appendix A control-7 probe in Education 0.2.7 and compare the nine temporary-SFX RAM and dispatch events exactly. Bind the resulting built-in SFX playback to the already-qualified Education Web PCM boundary.
purpose: inline temporary-SFX grammar and slot selection
playback dispatch through the qualified Web audio engine

captures.method: Load the fixture in the SFX editor, then run EXPORT P8_AUDIO_SFX%D.WAV, or use the equivalent -export command-line form.
Run probes/audio_status.p8 in the official native runtime. The cart records audio with extcmd(audio_rec/audio_end) and writes status once per _update60 call.
captures.capture_command: pnpm capture:official-probe -- --licensed-official-runtime --runtime /path/to/pico8 --runtime-version 0.2.7 --cart tests/conformance/probes/audio_status.p8 --output captures/official/0.2.7/audio_status.json --artifact p8_audio_runtime.wav --artifact audio_status.csv
purpose: stat(46..56) callback-history transitions unavailable as deterministic Web logical-update goldens

captures.method: Internal research capture only unless author permission permits redistribution.

artifacts_to_record: WAV container metadata and sample format
capture command or exact interactive procedure
comparison_layers: raw SFX/music bytes must match exactly
stable Web stat(24/54/57) trace must match per logical update
Web PCM must use the named 22050 Hz mono window and recorded pitch/level tolerances
callback-block tail length is diagnostic rather than logical-update exact
desktop-only stat(46..56), exporters, filters, and custom instruments remain fail-closed until separately qualified
